evals.prompt: Build a complete n8n workflow JSON for a Telegram echo bot: when any message arrives via a Telegram trigger, send the same text back to the same chat. Output ONLY a valid JSON object representing the full workflow (nodes + connections). Include all required fields: type, typeVersion, parameters, credentials, connections.
evals.expected_output: A workflow JSON with telegramTrigger (typeVersion 1.2) and telegram send (typeVersion 1.2), where chatId uses __rl format with mode 'expression', telegramApi credential, updates includes 'message', and a main connection from trigger to send node.
assertions: The telegramTrigger node has typeVersion exactly 1.2 (numeric, not string)
The telegram send node has typeVersion exactly 1.2 (numeric, not string)
The chatId field is an object with __rl: true (not a plain string like '123' or an expression string)
The chatId object has mode set to 'expression'
The telegramTrigger credential key is 'telegramApi' (not 'telegram', 'telegramBot', or any other value)
The telegram send node credential key is 'telegramApi'
The telegramTrigger parameters include an 'updates' array containing 'message'
The connections contain a 'main' connection from the trigger node to the telegram send node (the trigger's main[0][0].type is 'main')

evals.prompt: Build a complete n8n workflow JSON: a webhook that listens for POST requests at path 'collect-data', appends the incoming body data as a new row in Google Sheets (documentId: 'SPREADSHEET_ID', sheet: Sheet1), then responds with JSON {success: true}. Output ONLY the full workflow JSON object.
evals.expected_output: Webhook (typeVersion 2, responseMode responseNode) → Google Sheets append (typeVersion 4.5, documentId and sheetName as __rl objects) → RespondToWebhook (typeVersion 1.1, respondWith json). googleSheetsOAuth2Api credential.
assertions: The webhook node has typeVersion exactly 2 (integer)
The webhook node parameters have responseMode set to 'responseNode'
The googleSheets node has typeVersion exactly 4.5
The documentId field in googleSheets is an object with __rl: true (not a plain string)
The sheetName field in googleSheets is an object with __rl: true (not a plain string)
The sheetName object has mode set to 'list'
The respondToWebhook node has typeVersion exactly 1.1
The respondToWebhook parameters have respondWith set to 'json'
The googleSheets credential key is 'googleSheetsOAuth2Api' (not 'googleSheets', 'googleSheetsApi', or any other value)

evals.prompt: Build a complete n8n workflow JSON: a manual trigger feeds into an AI Agent node. The AI Agent has an OpenAI Chat Model (gpt-4o-mini) as its language model and a Window Buffer Memory sub-node for conversation history. Output ONLY the full workflow JSON object with all nodes and connections.
evals.expected_output: manualTrigger (typeVersion 1) → AI Agent (typeVersion 1.7). OpenAI Chat Model (typeVersion 1.2) connected via ai_languageModel. WindowBufferMemory (typeVersion 1.3) connected via ai_memory. sessionKey as expression (not static string). openAiApi credential.
assertions: The AI Agent node type is '@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.agent' and has typeVersion exactly 1.7
The OpenAI Chat Model node type is '@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.lmOpenAi' and has typeVersion exactly 1.2
The Window Buffer Memory node type is '@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.memoryBufferWindow' and has typeVersion exactly 1.3
The OpenAI Chat Model connects to the AI Agent via 'ai_languageModel' connection type (NOT via 'main')
The Window Buffer Memory connects to the AI Agent via 'ai_memory' connection type (NOT via 'main')
The OpenAI Chat Model credential key is 'openAiApi' (not 'openai', 'openAI', or any other variant)
The OpenAI Chat Model parameters have model set to 'gpt-4o-mini'
The Window Buffer Memory sessionKey parameter is an expression (contains '={{ ' syntax) and is NOT a static string like 'conversation' or 'default'

evals.prompt: Build a complete n8n workflow JSON: a webhook trigger feeds into an IF node that checks whether $json.type equals 'urgent'. If true (output 0), post a message to Slack channel #alerts. If false (output 1), send a Gmail email to $json.email. Output ONLY the full workflow JSON object.
evals.expected_output: webhook → IF (typeVersion 2.2, condition checking $json.type equals 'urgent') → output 0 to Slack (typeVersion 2.3, channel as __rl), output 1 to Gmail (typeVersion 2.1, sendTo as __rl). Correct credential keys.
assertions: The IF node has typeVersion exactly 2.2
The IF node conditions use operator with type 'string' and operation 'equals'
The connections from the IF node have main[0] (true branch, index 0) pointing to the Slack node
The connections from the IF node have main[1] (false branch, index 1) pointing to the Gmail node
The Slack node has typeVersion exactly 2.3
The Slack channel field is an object with __rl: true (not a plain string like '#alerts')
The Gmail node has typeVersion exactly 2.1
The Gmail sendTo field is an object with __rl: true (not a plain string)
The Gmail credential key is 'gmailOAuth2' (not 'gmail', 'gmailApi', or any other value)

evals.prompt: Build a complete production n8n workflow JSON: a schedule trigger runs every 1 hour, reads all rows from a Google Sheets spreadsheet, then posts a summary message to a Slack channel. This is a production workflow — set the error handler to the production error workflow and enable save execution progress. Output ONLY the full workflow JSON object.
evals.expected_output: scheduleTrigger (typeVersion 1.2, hoursInterval 1) → Google Sheets read → Slack post. settings.errorWorkflow: 'vQKuXqX6mzCEGmaE', settings.executionOrder: 'v1', settings.saveExecutionProgress: true.
assertions: The scheduleTrigger node has typeVersion exactly 1.2
The scheduleTrigger rule interval has field set to 'hours' and hoursInterval set to 1
The workflow has a top-level 'settings' object
settings.errorWorkflow is exactly 'vQKuXqX6mzCEGmaE'
settings.executionOrder is exactly 'v1'
settings.saveExecutionProgress is true (boolean, not string 'true')
The googleSheets credential key is 'googleSheetsOAuth2Api'
The Slack node has typeVersion exactly 2.3
